subcodes.first_line: O name of God! the servant in attendance hath mentioned thy requests and likewise thy letters, and all have been accepted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم الله عبد حاضر مطالب آنجنابرا ذکر نمود و همچنین مراسلاترا و کل بقبول
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Muhammad; Islam, @Hands of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for unity
